classifications.phrase: progress in bringing inflation back to the target range of 2 to 3 per cent…
Underlying inflation was higher than expected at the time of the August forecasts
the risk of inflation remaining higher for longer had risen
an increase in interest rates was therefore warranted
inflation is continuing to moderate, driven by the goods sector
Conditions in the labour market also continued to ease gradually
Higher interest rates are working to establish a more sustainable balance between aggregate supply and…
Holding the cash rate steady at this meeting will allow time to assess the impact
Returning inflation to target within a reasonable timeframe remains the Boards priority
Whether further tightening of monetary policy is required to ensure that inflation returns to target

payload.rationale: The RBA signals a hawkish stance focused on inflation control, having recently raised rates and signalling readiness for further tightening if needed, while acknowledging some moderation in inflation and easing labour market conditions.
